response.justification: Candidate is a competent senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. Total experience is roughly 13-14 years with most of it in web/product engineering; AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling work at re:cinq. No demonstrated AI platforms, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of executive-level customer advisory or strategic influence at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic AI developer tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, open-source founder of GISCollective, public talks and workshops
concerns: Falls short of 15 years and lacks Director/Principal-level IC scope or strategic advisory experience
No recognized AI expertise, advanced AI degree, or shipped AI products/platforms
No evidence of cloud-platform strategy work or advising strategic customers/partners on cutting-edge adoption

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Insufficient seniority for Director-level IC scope
